title: Unique Accessories
description: Adds unique accessory obtainable from defeating mobs or from chests in structures
body:
![Unique Accessories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vwBog0Jm/images/80f0a65d3da1330af47ba1aa5b586d968d68ee8d.png)


**Unique Accessories** is a mod that add accessories with special effects that can be obtained by defeating mobs or finding chests inside structures.

These accessories have a variety of abilities, such as increasing base stats, allowing you to climb walls, or even granting area-of-effect attacks with goat horns.
These add new fun and strategic depth to Minecraft's adventures, exploration, and combat.

Accessory drop rates and attribute values can be customized in the config menu.

[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) / [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes) / [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) are required.

![Unique Accessories Slots](https://i.imgur.com/NrpOGXt.png)

This mod provides two charm slots, one belt slot and one feet slot.


## **🔍How to Obtain Accessories**

The added accessories cannot be crafted.

There are four ways to obtain accessories.

1. **Defeating mobs**

2. **Chests in structures**

3. **Trading with Wandering Trader**

4. **Using Accessory Box**

![Accessory Box](https://i.imgur.com/U4YG4pr.png)

The **Accessory Box** is an item that allows you to obtain one accessory with the following probability when used.


<details>
<summary>Common 80%</summary>

Strong Sticky Slime Ball

Starved Wolf Skull

Ancient Chisel

Withered Heart

Small Propulsion Device

Supreme Meat

Amplifier Stone

Fossil Shark Tooth

All-Purpose Seasoning

Cursed Doll Head

Snow Golem Doll

Survival Belt

Black Belt

Tool Belt

Life Jacket Belt

Waist Warmer

Sharp Fishing Hook

Blade Shoes

Anklet of Fortune

Durable Spring

Bloody Knife

Suspicious Mushroom

Ninjutsu Manual

Large Paddle

Rose of Temptation

</details>

<details>
<summary>Rare 18%</summary>

Golden Egg

Royal Honeycomb

Soul Gem

Devil's Eyeball

Tabi

Magick Quiver

Shiny Stone

Championship Belt

Silver Cat Tail

Rocket Shoes

Still Beating Heart

Power Crystal

Rusty Guillotine Blade

</details>

<details>
<summary>Epic 2%</summary>

Sun Stone

Moon Stone

Burning Soul

Master Ninja's Tabi

Ender Lens

</details>

Accessory boxes can be obtained by trading with Wandering Traders or from chests in structures.


## **📕Accessories List**

The current version includes **44 accessories**.

All accessories have Fire Resistance.

Future updates will consider implementing new accessories and adjusting ability balances.

Here's how to get some accessories and their effects.

## ![Golden Egg Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59b02e7066e76969f6d4254221e7b2479ac3789e_0.webp) Golden Egg

![Golden Egg Description](https://i.imgur.com/sCc5ssa.png)

When a chicken lays an egg, there is a 1/500 chance it will drop a Golden Egg.


## ![Royal Honeycomb Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b41e83e9522d7b41b50e1990d963c2ac37028201_0.webp) Royal Honeycomb

![Royal Honeycomb Description](https://i.imgur.com/wFYT8qd.png)

When collecting Honeycomb from Bee Nests or Beehives, there is a 1/200 chance of obtaining it.


## ![Strong Sticky Slime Ball Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38ecbaab13abb096944f8c86b217a7d533a763ea_0.webp) Strong Sticky Slime Ball

![Strong Sticky Slime Ball Description](https://i.imgur.com/eczu3xw.png)

Slimes drops with a 1/500 chance


## ![Snow Golem Doll Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20015744e880326b016a26a1d34fe864ae8c6741_0.webp) **Snow Golem Doll**

![Snow Golem Doll Description](https://i.imgur.com/PodrYsY.png)

Can be obtained from Igloo chests with a 40% chance.


## ![Silver Cat Tail Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6de572891103c8d8610da456e24aac9fe20b3e63_0.webp) **Silver Cat Tail**

![Sliver Cat Tail Description](https://i.imgur.com/X6kme88.png)

Can be obtained from the Woodland Mansion  chests with a 7% chance.


## ![Championship Belt Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6084143801350e79dca3e9fcfb8215e1fbbc9c3_0.webp) **Championship Belt**

![Championship Belt](https://i.imgur.com/ajEAMNw.png)

Can be obtained by trading with Wandering Traders.



## Finally

Thank you for reading this far. If you have any problems or requests, please feel free to contact us.

Your accessory ideas might be reflected in this MOD!

Now, enjoy Unique Accessories!
